title: Tao Te Ching 39
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 39 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 39 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Of old, those that attained oneness: heaven attained oneness and became clear; earth attained oneness and became tranquil.
